src-blondieinmorocco-barcaite.article_date_note: undated; estimated November 2025 from site context
src-blondieinmorocco-barcaite.writer_profile: Food writer for Blondie in Morocco, where Rasa Barcaite creates comprehensive food guides exploring the culinary landscape of Morocco. Her recent work includes detailed restaurant and dining recommendations that help travelers and locals discover authentic Moroccan cuisine and dining experiences.

src-bewilderedinmorocco-mizinskamomcilov.writer_profile: A food writer for Bewildered in Morocco, Monika Mizińska-Momčilović contributes culinary guides that help navigate Morocco's dining landscape. Her work focuses on providing practical food guidance for those exploring Moroccan cuisine and restaurant culture.

src-marrakechmadame-durant.writer_profile: Food writer for Marrakech Madame, contributing comprehensive dining guides that explore the culinary landscape of Morocco's vibrant food scene. Camille Durant specializes in creating detailed restaurant recommendations and food guides for travelers and locals seeking authentic dining experiences in Marrakech.

src-timeout-hardykirby.writer_profile: Food writer for Time Out Marrakech, specializing in the city's vibrant culinary landscape and dining scene. Paula Hardy provides insider guides to help locals and travelers discover the best restaurants, street food, and hidden culinary gems throughout Morocco's cultural capital.

src-midnightblueelephant-ziehen.article_date_note: undated; estimated January 2026 from site context
src-midnightblueelephant-ziehen.writer_profile: Food writer for The Midnight Blue Elephant, Annika Ziehen creates comprehensive dining guides to help readers navigate the culinary landscape. Her recent food guide work focuses on curating restaurant recommendations and dining insights. Through The Midnight Blue Elephant, she provides practical food and restaurant coverage for local diners.

src-anoushkaprobyn-probyn.writer_profile: Food writer who creates comprehensive dining guides for LocalBite users. Her publication focuses on curating essential restaurant recommendations and culinary insights to help diners discover their next great meal.

restaurants.name: L'Mida

sources.quote: Their lamb tagine is tender enough to eat with a spoon, and the couscous dishes are always perfectly fluffy.
Rooftop and restaurant with modern Moroccan interior. Coffee was really good, lamb burger very good.
dishes_mentioned: tuna poke bowl with zucchini noodles

restaurants.quote: Their lamb tagine is tender enough to eat with a spoon, and the couscous dishes are always perfectly fluffy.

restaurants.name: Chez Lamine

sources.quote: The tender, fall-off-the-bone meat and friendly service make it a regular stop in my Marrakech food adventures.

restaurants.quote: The tender, fall-off-the-bone meat and friendly service make it a regular stop in my Marrakech food adventures.

restaurants.name: Le Tanjia

sources.quote: Le Tanjia proves that you can enjoy a touch of luxury without emptying your wallet, with evening belly dancing performances.

restaurants.quote: Le Tanjia proves that you can enjoy a touch of luxury without emptying your wallet, with evening belly dancing performances.

restaurants.name: Chez Mmima

sources.quote: The Harira soup here reminds me of what my Moroccan friends' mothers make - it's that authentic!

restaurants.quote: The Harira soup here reminds me of what my Moroccan friends' mothers make - it's that authentic!

restaurants.name: Sahbi Sahbi

sources.quote: Food here is deeply traditional but executed in sophisticated style by some very experienced cooks.

restaurants.quote: Food here is deeply traditional but executed in sophisticated style by some very experienced cooks.

restaurants.name: Pétanque Social Club

sources.quote: dine on pizza and fab fusion food beneath the magnolia tree, hang at the bar with a Saharan spritz

restaurants.quote: dine on pizza and fab fusion food beneath the magnolia tree, hang at the bar with a Saharan spritz

restaurants.name: Maison Reine

sources.quote: Heart of lettuce drenched in dressing and topped with pistachio dust are absolutely delicious, as is the grapefruit pavlova.
dishes_mentioned: heart of lettuce with pistachio dust

restaurants.quote: Heart of lettuce drenched in dressing and topped with pistachio dust are absolutely delicious, as is the grapefruit pavlova.

restaurants.name: Farmers

sources.quote: Seasonal, creative farm-to-fork menu. Delicately seasoned meat and fish served alongside unusual veggie offerings, organic wines and mocktails.

restaurants.quote: Seasonal, creative farm-to-fork menu. Delicately seasoned meat and fish served alongside unusual veggie offerings, organic wines and mocktails.

sources.quote: delicate marinated sardines, the black rice and crab croquettes and crowd-pleasing schnitzel with fresh coleslaw
L'un des restaurants les plus modernes et créatifs de Guéliz, très apprécié par les amateurs de bonne cuisine et les expatriés.

restaurants.quote: delicate marinated sardines, the black rice and crab croquettes and crowd-pleasing schnitzel with fresh coleslaw

restaurants.name: Dar Yacout

sources.quote: multi-course gastronomic Moroccan diffa feast in lavishly decorated dining rooms with musicians playing the oud
pastilla, tajines, couscous et pâtisseries traditionnelles, servis en plusieurs temps. L'ambiance feutrée, les salons richement décorés.

restaurants.quote: multi-course gastronomic Moroccan diffa feast in lavishly decorated dining rooms with musicians playing the oud

restaurants.name: Nomad

sources.quote: cumin-slathered calamari from Agadir, organic chicken marinated in sweet harissa and crunchy cauliflower and fennel salad
La carte revisite les plats marocains avec une touche créative et actuelle, tout en proposant quelques options végétariennes.
Roof terrace offers best views over medina and Place des Epices with water mist sprinklers in summer.

restaurants.quote: cumin-slathered calamari from Agadir, organic chicken marinated in sweet harissa and crunchy cauliflower and fennel salad

restaurants.name: Naranj

sources.quote: fatet batinjan (aubergine covered in spicy mincemeat, yoghurt and pita chips) — excellent Lebanese cuisine in the heart of the medina

restaurants.quote: fatet batinjan (aubergine covered in spicy mincemeat, yoghurt and pita chips) — excellent Lebanese cuisine in the heart of the medina

restaurants.name: Amal

sources.quote: they serve one of the best couscous dishes in Marrakech (around 50 MAD), available only on Fridays.
heart-warming, homely favourites like lentil, cauliflower and leeks salad and a truly excellent fish tagine on Fridays

restaurants.geo_matched_name: Association Amal - Women Training Center and Moroccan Restaurant
restaurants.quote: they serve one of the best couscous dishes in Marrakech (around 50 MAD), available only on Fridays.

restaurants.name: Chez Bejguenni

sources.quote: grilled liver, lungs and even brains, served either in a tagine or simply grilled — consistently good grilled meat

restaurants.quote: grilled liver, lungs and even brains, served either in a tagine or simply grilled — consistently good grilled meat

restaurants.name: Chez Ouazzani

sources.quote: My personal favourites are the mezze-style starters: Baba Ganoush (roasted aubergine dip) and Muhammara Harra (roasted peppers with nuts).

restaurants.quote: My personal favourites are the mezze-style starters: Baba Ganoush (roasted aubergine dip) and Muhammara Harra (roasted peppers with nuts).

restaurants.name: Grand Café de la Poste

sources.quote: I usually go there a bit dressed up, when I want to feel a touch more elegant and sink into the French Art Deco mood.

restaurants.quote: I usually go there a bit dressed up, when I want to feel a touch more elegant and sink into the French Art Deco mood.

restaurants.name: Espace Fruits Othmane

sources.quote: They are famous for their omelettes, served in small metal pans. My favourite is the omelette with dried meat (khlia).

restaurants.quote: They are famous for their omelettes, served in small metal pans. My favourite is the omelette with dried meat (khlia).

restaurants.name: Al Fassia

sources.quote: The signature dish is the slow-cooked shoulder of lamb. Most of the menu is classic Moroccan, but the kitchen gives the dishes a slightly modern twist.
Tajines, couscous et spécialités marocaines sont préparés dans le respect des traditions, avec des produits soigneusement sélectionnés.

restaurants.quote: The signature dish is the slow-cooked shoulder of lamb. Most of the menu is classic Moroccan, but the kitchen gives the dishes a slightly modern twist.

restaurants.name: La Trattoria

sources.quote: The Art Deco-style bar feels like an old English gentlemen's club: soft lighting, live musicians on some evenings, cigars, and a working fireplace.
Fettuccine with prawns and zucchini, and Ravioli 'alla tanjia' with olive tapenade. Though both very tasty, if I was to nit-pick...
dishes_mentioned: ravioli alla tanjia with olive tapenade

restaurants.quote: The Art Deco-style bar feels like an old English gentlemen's club: soft lighting, live musicians on some evenings, cigars, and a working fireplace.

restaurants.name: Entrepotes

sources.quote: My favourite part is the inner garden. If you plan to go, definitely reserve a table in the garden area specifically.

restaurants.quote: My favourite part is the inner garden. If you plan to go, definitely reserve a table in the garden area specifically.

restaurants.name: Épicurien

sources.quote: I usually go with friends around midnight, when the live band starts playing (before that there is a DJ).

restaurants.quote: I usually go with friends around midnight, when the live band starts playing (before that there is a DJ).

restaurants.name: La Taverna

sources.quote: It feels a bit like stepping into the 1980s: older waiters in white gloves, waterfalls playing on the TV screens, simple food.

restaurants.quote: It feels a bit like stepping into the 1980s: older waiters in white gloves, waterfalls playing on the TV screens, simple food.

restaurants.name: Casa Jose Marrakech

sources.quote: good for tapas, shared plates and a later dinner. The menu leans towards grilled fish, seafood and classic Spanish dishes.

restaurants.quote: good for tapas, shared plates and a later dinner. The menu leans towards grilled fish, seafood and classic Spanish dishes.

restaurants.name: laÔ Marrakech

sources.quote: rooftop restaurant and bar with wide, open views over the Guéliz skyline – one of the few places in Marrakech where you really see the modern city from above.

restaurants.quote: rooftop restaurant and bar with wide, open views over the Guéliz skyline – one of the few places in Marrakech where you really see the modern city from above.

restaurants.name: Les Jardins de Guéliz

sources.quote: a quiet, sit-down restaurant with both French and Moroccan dishes on the menu. It's an easy choice if you want a straightforward three-course meal.

restaurants.quote: a quiet, sit-down restaurant with both French and Moroccan dishes on the menu. It's an easy choice if you want a straightforward three-course meal.

restaurants.name: Le Foundouk

sources.quote: La cuisine proposée est un subtil mélange de gastronomie marocaine et d'influences méditerranéennes, avec des plats raffinés.

restaurants.quote: La cuisine proposée est un subtil mélange de gastronomie marocaine et d'influences méditerranéennes, avec des plats raffinés.

restaurants.name: Beldi Fusion

sources.quote: Les recettes traditionnelles revisitées, où les saveurs beldi rencontrent des influences contemporaines, aussi bien dans l'assiette qu'en termes d'ambiance.

restaurants.quote: Les recettes traditionnelles revisitées, où les saveurs beldi rencontrent des influences contemporaines, aussi bien dans l'assiette qu'en termes d'ambiance.

restaurants.name: Meat Grill Marrakech

sources.quote: La qualité exceptionnelle de ses pièces de bœuf, soigneusement sélectionnées et parfaitement maîtrisées à la cuisson.

restaurants.quote: La qualité exceptionnelle de ses pièces de bœuf, soigneusement sélectionnées et parfaitement maîtrisées à la cuisson.

restaurants.name: Sesamo (Royal Mansour)

sources.quote: The gnocchetti were extra light and fluffy yet rich and earthy thanks to the beetroot.

restaurants.quote: The gnocchetti were extra light and fluffy yet rich and earthy thanks to the beetroot.

restaurants.name: Le Marocain (La Mamounia)

sources.quote: The pastilla was filled with lobster and meatballs with foie gras. The couscous was flaky AND buttery.

restaurants.quote: The pastilla was filled with lobster and meatballs with foie gras. The couscous was flaky and buttery.

restaurants.name: Le Jardin (Royal Mansour)

sources.quote: Set in beautiful gardens surrounded by orange, olive and palm trees with lots of fish and seafood options.

restaurants.quote: Set in beautiful gardens surrounded by orange, olive and palm trees with lots of fish and seafood options.

restaurants.name: Le Trou Au Mur

sources.quote: A great choice if seeking a local yet fancier option where you can drink wine and cocktails.

restaurants.quote: A great choice if seeking a local yet fancier option where you can drink wine and cocktails.

restaurants.name: La Famille

sources.quote: Only open for lunch with just two seatings. A small garden oasis—Instagram-worthy with shared tables.

restaurants.quote: Only open for lunch with just two seatings. A small garden oasis—Instagram-worthy with shared tables.

restaurants.name: Le Jardin

sources.quote: La cuisine proposée est à la fois marocaine et méditerranéenne, avec des plats frais, colorés et bien exécutés.
Well-liked restaurant tiled green with lots of trees. Garden-riad setting beautiful, quite hidden in souks.

restaurants.quote: La cuisine proposée est à la fois marocaine et méditerranéenne, avec des plats frais, colorés et bien exécutés.

restaurants.name: Le Slimana

sources.quote: Rooftop is lovely. While lacking mountain views due to construction, it's really nice and less crowded.
dishes_mentioned: hummus gnocchi with truffle and artichokes

restaurants.quote: Rooftop is lovely. While lacking mountain views due to construction, it's really nice and less crowded.

restaurants.name: Terrace des Épices

sources.quote: Nice place with great rooftop views offering something different. Serves wine and beer, uncommon for medina.

restaurants.quote: Nice place with great rooftop views offering something different. Serves wine and beer, uncommon for the medina.

restaurants.name: Limoni

sources.quote: Perfect restaurant for nice pasta plate in Morocco. Pasta dishes rather good, pizza decent with generous toppings.

restaurants.quote: Perfect restaurant for nice pasta plate in Morocco. Pasta dishes rather good, pizza decent with generous toppings.

restaurants.name: Cafe Clock

sources.quote: Come for camel burger or smoothie and hikayat—Moroccan storytelling in English with cultural Q&A sessions.

restaurants.quote: Come for camel burger or smoothie and hikayat—Moroccan storytelling in English with cultural Q&A sessions.

restaurants.name: Le Salama

sources.quote: Cheese 'cigarettes' wrapped in pastry with a sweet chilli dipping sauce. Cheese and pastry are just an elite combination.
dishes_mentioned: cheese cigarettes with sweet chilli sauce

restaurants.quote: Cheese 'cigarettes' wrapped in pastry with a sweet chilli dipping sauce. Cheese and pastry are just an elite combination.

restaurants.name: Folk Marrakech

sources.quote: Yalla 3 course menu at 370 dirhams (around £30) per person, which was more than enough food as portion sizes are ample.

restaurants.quote: Yalla 3 course menu at 370 dirhams (around £30) per person, which was more than enough food as portion sizes are ample.

restaurants.name: Les Jardins du Lotus

sources.quote: Braised octopus and steak quesadillas. I would never think to pair octopus with crunchy fried chickpeas, but it works beautifully!
dishes_mentioned: braised octopus with crunchy fried chickpeas

restaurants.quote: Braised octopus and steak quesadillas. I would never think to pair octopus with crunchy fried chickpeas, but it works beautifully!

restaurants.name: Le Table du Souk (La Sultana)

sources.quote: Menu focuses on Moroccan flavours and local producers, with dishes inspired by the Market and Moroccan street food.

restaurants.quote: Menu focuses on Moroccan flavours and local producers, with dishes inspired by the Market and Moroccan street food.
